nasb.text: From the cities on that day the sons of Benjamin were numbered, 26,000 men who draw the sword, besides the inhabitants of Gibeah who were numbered, 700 choice men.

esv.text: And the people of Benjamin mustered out of their cities on that day 26,000 men who drew the sword, besides the inhabitants of Gibeah, who mustered 700 chosen men.

cnv.text: 那時便雅憫人，從各城裡被數點的，共有二萬六千拿刀的，另外被數點的，還有基比亞的居民，共有七百精兵。

ccb.text: 便雅悯人从各城召集了两万六千刀兵，还从基比亚召集了七百精兵。
